---
title: "GCDv4 Snapshot from PALEOFIRE"
author: Nick H.
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-22"
---

Trying to diagnose the status of the GCDv4 snapshot ("paleofire in progress") on paleofire.org. Chiefly, when is it from? Whose data does it include?

The first map is all the cores with their site names from the GCD. (click for site name.)

The second map is only the cores that have an update_date on their charcoal. You can find the latest update date by clicking on the site in that second map. They are colored by year.

```{r car,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE,echo=FALSE}


library(DBI)
library(RMariaDB)
library(DT)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(lubridate)

con <- dbConnect(
  RMariaDB::MariaDB(),
  username = "nicholashoffman",
  dbname   = "GCD_paleofire_in_progress",
  unix.sock = "/tmp/mysql.sock"
)



core <- tbl(con, "t_core") %>%
  select_all() %>%
  collect()


datbase <- tbl(con, "tr_database") %>%
    select_all() %>%
    collect()

notes = tbl(con, "t_notes") %>%
    select_all() %>%
    collect()

note_model = tbl(con, "t_note_age_model") %>%
    select_all() %>%
    collect()

char = tbl(con, "t_charcoal") %>%
    select_all() %>%
    collect()

sample <- tbl(con, "t_sample") %>%
    select_all() %>%
    collect()


site <- tbl(con, "t_site") %>%
  select_all() %>%
  collect()

core_comb= site %>% left_join(core,by=join_by(ID_SITE)) %>% left_join(sample,by=join_by(ID_CORE)) %>% left_join(char,by=join_by(ID_SAMPLE))

core_comb1 = core_comb %>% drop_na(UPDATE_DATE) %>% group_by(ID_CORE) %>% dplyr::filter(UPDATE_DATE == max(UPDATE_DATE))

core_comb2 = core_comb %>% distinct(ID_CORE,.keep_all=TRUE)  %>% drop_na(LONGITUDE,LATITUDE)
core_sf = core_comb2 %>% st_as_sf(coords=c("LONGITUDE","LATITUDE"),crs=4326)


core_sf_dated = core_comb1 %>% st_as_sf(coords=c("LONGITUDE","LATITUDE"),crs=4326) %>% mutate(year = year(UPDATE_DATE))


pal <- colorFactor(palette = "Set1", domain =core_sf_dated$year)


leaflet() %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addCircleMarkers(data=core_sf,
                     stroke=FALSE,
                     radius=3,
                     fillOpacity=0.5,
                     popup = ~SITE_NAME) 



leaflet() %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addCircleMarkers(data=core_sf_dated,
                     stroke=FALSE,
                     color=~pal(year),
                     radius=3,
                     fillOpacity=0.5,
                     popup = ~UPDATE_DATE) 

```

\
